title: Gemini 3.2 released by June 30, 2026?
description: Market on whether Google's Gemini 3.2 model is made available to the general public by June 30, 2026.
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Google's Gemini 3.2 model is made available to the general public by the specified date ET. Gemini 3.2 must be explicitly named or recognized as a direct successor to Gemini 3.1. Gemini 3.2/3.3/3.4 variants may qualify; specialized non-text modality models, Gemini 4, closed betas, private access, placeholder labels, and inaccessible labels do not qualify.
resolution_source: Official information from Google, with additional verification from a consensus of credible reporting.

title: Gemini 3.5 released by June 30, 2026?
description: Market on whether Google's Gemini 3.5 model is made available to the general public by June 30, 2026.
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Google's Gemini 3.5 model is made available to the general public by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Gemini 3.5 must be explicitly named or recognized as a successor to Gemini 3. Products labeled Gemini 4 or additional Gemini 3 models do not count. Closed beta or private access does not suffice.
resolution_source: Official information from Google, with additional verification from a consensus of credible reporting.

title: Will Google have the best AI model at the end of June 2026?
description: Outcome in the market group 'Which company has best AI model end of June?'
resolution_rules: Resolves according to the company that owns the model with the highest arena score on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard when checked on June 30, 2026, 12:00 PM ET. Uses the Arena Score section on the Leaderboard tab at lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control off. Ties are resolved alphabetically by company name in the market group.
resolution_source: Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard at lmarena.ai.

title: AI wins IMO gold medal in 2026?
description: Market on whether any AI gets a gold medal in the International Math Olympiad during 2026.
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if any AI gets a gold medal in the International Math Olympiad between January 1, 2026 and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. If the IMO Grand Challenge or Artificial Intelligence Math Olympiad demonstrates an AI has won the challenge or prize before the resolution date, the market resolves Yes.
resolution_source: IMO Grand Challenge and Artificial Intelligence Math Olympiad.

title: Will SpaceX have the highest IPO market cap in 2026?
description: Outcome in the market group 'Largest IPO by market cap in 2026?'
resolution_rules: Resolves to the company that achieves the highest market capitalization in U.S. dollars based on the official closing price on its first trading day in 2026. Eligible companies must complete an IPO between January 1 and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Market capitalization is outstanding shares multiplied by closing share price on first trading day. Ties resolve alphabetically. Resolution uses the primary exchange official listing page, or another reliable source if unavailable. Foreign currency values are converted using the Federal Reserve H.10 reference rate.
resolution_source: Primary exchange official listing page, another reliable source if needed, and Federal Reserve H.10 for currency conversion.

title: Will Anthropic have the highest IPO market cap in 2026?
description: Outcome in the market group 'Largest IPO by market cap in 2026?'
resolution_rules: Resolves to the company that achieves the highest market capitalization in U.S. dollars based on the official closing price on its first trading day in 2026. Eligible companies must complete an IPO between January 1 and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Market capitalization is outstanding shares multiplied by closing share price on first trading day. Ties resolve alphabetically. Resolution uses the primary exchange official listing page, or another reliable source if unavailable. Foreign currency values are converted using the Federal Reserve H.10 reference rate.
resolution_source: Primary exchange official listing page, another reliable source if needed, and Federal Reserve H.10 for currency conversion.

title: SpaceX IPO Closing Market Cap
description: Market group on SpaceX's market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading.
resolution_rules: Resolves based on SpaceX's market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading. If no SpaceX IPO occurs by December 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market resolves to 'No IPO before 2028'. Market capitalization is outstanding shares multiplied by closing share price on first trading day. If a value falls between brackets, the higher bracket resolves. Resolution uses the primary exchange official listing page or another reliable source if needed.
resolution_source: Primary exchange official listing page, another reliable source if needed.

title: Anthropic $500B+ valuation in 2026?
description: Market on whether Anthropic achieves a public valuation of at least $500B or raises a private round valuing it at least $500B in 2026.
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Anthropic achieves a public valuation of $500B or more, or raises a private funding round valuing the company at $500B or more between market creation and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Requires explicit confirmation by Anthropic or overwhelming consensus of credible reporting. Otherwise resolves No.
resolution_source: Anthropic official communications, with overwhelming consensus of credible reporting also allowed.

title: No IPO by June 30, 2026
description: Outcome in the market group 'Anthropic IPO Closing Market Cap'.
resolution_rules: Resolves based on Anthropic's market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading. If no IPO occurs by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market resolves to 'No IPO by June 30, 2026'. Market capitalization is outstanding shares multiplied by closing share price on first trading day. If a value falls between brackets, the higher bracket resolves. Resolution uses the primary exchange official listing page or another reliable source if needed.
resolution_source: Primary exchange official listing page or another reliable source if needed.
